description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock and handguard, a black metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. The rifle features a long, cylindrical barrel with a front sight post and a rear notch sight, both made of metal. The wooden components have a reddish-brown finish, contrasting with the matte black metal of the receiver, barrel, and magazine. The trigger, trigger guard, and safety lever are all visible, as well as the charging handle on the right side. The magazine is prominently curved and appears to be made of metal or polymer. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, typical of military rifles used in urban and field environments.
description: A classic assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. The rifle has a long barrel with iron sights and a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel end, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and the receiver details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the barrel and sights.
